game_info.title: Phantom Cat Adventure
game_info.concept:
New contents:

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/super-phantom-cat-2/id1153486225

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

New contents:
1. Bingo lottery system, which can draw various material prizes in the game, including new content: a new Bingo base building, 71 new mission levels, a set of  new skins of Prince Ari
2. Guru Hero Squad, containing 3 brand new heroes: Kakat, Minmint, Neant
3. Title system: Players can obtain corresponding title rewards by collecting how many exploration points, there are currently eight levels
4. Wish Tree building added fixed Hero Shard output
5. Optimized the overall numerical balance of the game

Meet Ari. He's on a journey to rescue his sister, Ina, who has been kidnapped in the mysterious Phantom world. He's determined. He's focused. But super-scary enemies, super powers, allies and hidden secrets await him.  

In Super Phantom Cat 2, you can possess the best Phantom superpowers yet: 
· Bounce higher and higher to reach for the sky and stars.
· Float on balloons into the Wild Woods and Alps.
· Break walls, stone, and metal.
· Shrink and enlarge monsters with the touch of a finger. 
· Turn irritating critters into ice statues. 
· Shift to invincible mode if danger still prevails.  

Play as one of many characters, such as: 
· The lead singer and guitarist of a band.
· A dancer who plays pranks and dresses up as a skeleton.
· A pink-haired magician who is a master of cards.
· A funky teen skater obsessed with extreme sports.
· An adventurous cowboy always on a lookout for treasure. 
· And champions from Mushroom stomping, Juice blending and Cuteness competitions. 

Plus... 

· Find hidden secrets in the mysterious Phantom World. 
· Discover different levels and checkpoints. 
  
It's a purr-iceless experience for everyone!  

And...  

In Super Phantom Cat 2, you can own props, which save you from cata-astrophe. If cats have nine lives, you can earn even more!  

· Create props based on your own requirements. · Whether you are a beginner or a master at platform games, you need these props to complete your mission.  

Wait, there's more... 

Save your progress across multiple devices. Mobiles, tablets, Apple TV — you can access Super Phantom Cat 2 from all of these locations.  

From the creators of Super Phantom Cat, which featured in the App Store's "Best of 2016," Super Phantom Cat 2 is the hottest, baddest platform game of 2017. 
——————————————————————
We love to hear from our fans.  
Email us with ideas and feedback: service@veewo.com
Like us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/veewosupercat/ 
Follow us on Twitter for latest updates: @VeewoGames and @SuperPhantomCat
game_info.description: "Phantom Cat Adventure" is a vibrant 2D platformer set in a mysterious digital world. You play as Ari, a hero with phantom powers, on a quest to rescue his sister. Navigate treacherous neon landscapes, collect Data Shards to increase your score, and utilize the Phantom Ice power to freeze enemies in their tracks. Reach the dimensional portal at the end of the level to win!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / Right: Move Ari left or right
- Space: Jump (Hold for higher jump)
- Shift: Sprint (Move faster)
- Z: Fire Ice Blast (Requires energy)
- Enter: Start the game from the main menu
- Esc: Pause or Unpause the game
- R: Restart the game from the Game Over or Win screen

TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot will simulate holding the Right Arrow key to move forward and periodically press Space to jump. This tests the core locomotion physics, gravity application, and ground collision detection.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player entity's X coordinate should increase consistently. The Y coordinate should fluctuate (jump and gravity) but stabilize on platforms. The game should remain in the PLAYING phase.
TEST_1.strategy: The bot will simulate holding the Right Arrow key to move forward and periodically press Space to jump. This tests the core locomotion physics, gravity application, and ground collision detection.
TEST_1.expected: The player entity's X coordinate should increase consistently. The Y coordinate should fluctuate (jump and gravity) but stabilize on platforms. The game should remain in the PLAYING phase.

TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot uses a heuristic algorithm to move towards the goal (Level Portal). It will jump when obstacles or gaps are detected ahead using "raycast" logic simulation and shoot ice blasts if enemies are near.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should successfully navigate the terrain, avoid death by pits or enemies, and eventually collide with the Goal Portal, triggering the GAME_OVER_WIN phase.

TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot will wait for an enemy to come within range and then press 'Z' to fire an Ice Blast projectile. It verifies the projectile spawn and trajectory.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: A projectile entity should be created and travel across the screen. If it hits an enemy, the enemy should be neutralized (frozen or destroyed).
